title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Urges World to Help Protect Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The president called on Britain, China, France, Japan, and South Korea to send warships to secure the route. Iran has effectively choked off traffic in the narrow waterway, through which a fifth of the world’s oil must transit.
